description: Focused view of a single relay: self-probe health, peer connectivity, and smokeping-style RTT

panels.description: Alive-check status for the selected relay (top) and peer (bottom). Values: 1=Online, -1=Timeout, -2=Setup fail, -3=Auth fail, -4=TLS fail, -5=Refused, -6=DNS fail, 0=Unknown.
panels.title: Availability

panels.description: Smokeping-style: median RTT line with p10 (slowest) - p90 (quickest) band.
panels.title: Self-probe RTT

panels.description: Median RTT from this relay to each peer.
panels.title: Outbound Median RTT -- $relay -> all peers

panels.description: Probe status from this relay to all peers over time.
panels.title: Outbound -- $relay -> peers

panels.description: Probe status from all peers to this relay over time.
panels.title: Inbound -- peers -> $relay

panels.description: Smokeping-style: median RTT line with p10 (slowest) - p90 (quickest) band.
panels.title: $relay -> $peer RTT (outbound)

panels.description: Smokeping-style: median RTT line with p10 (slowest) - p90 (quickest) band.
panels.title: $peer -> $relay RTT (inbound)

panels.description: Probe success/failure for this specific pair.
panels.title: $relay -> $peer Health
Iroh availability -- $relay
panels.description: Iroh-relay HTTP health for the selected relay. 1=ok, 0=down, -2=no-metadata, -3=imap-failed, -5=timeout.

panels.title: Iroh latency -- $relay
panels.description: Last iroh-relay HTTP GET latency. One sample per probe round (~15 min cadence). Log y-axis.

title: Relay Network: Single Relay
